title: draba praealta var. yellowstonensis
intro: Draba praealta var. yellowstonensis, also known as Yellowstone draba, is a variety of the Draba praealta plant, a small, annual or biennial cruciferous species that belongs to the mustard family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its chemical composition of isothiocyanates and other compounds. The health benefits of Draba praealta var. yellowstonensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in water or alcohol, and it is often used in folk medicine to treat various skin conditions and infections.
